bug: 调课审批 / 我的调课申请 页面缺少返回 /dashboard 的入口，且无 ProtectedShell 包裹的侧边栏
rootCause: K28-A 引入的 page.tsx 是顶层 client component，没有像其它 admin 页面一样用 ProtectedShell 包裹，也没有显式返回按钮

fix.scope: minimum — back button only (no layout restructure per K31-B instructions)

userPage.addedJsx: <Link href="/dashboard"><Button variant="outline" size="sm" aria-label="返回排课展示"><ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4 mr-1.5" />返回排课展示</Button></Link>
userPage.placement: page header right side, before refresh button

adminPage.placement: page header right side, before status filter select

fix.frontendChanges: navigation only — no business logic, no API, no DB, no RBAC

protectedShellWrapping: not changed — out of scope per 'minimum fix' instruction

k31BVerify.result: K31-B ADJUSTMENT REQUEST PAGES BACK-NAV FIX VERIFY PASS

knownLimitations: Pages still outside ProtectedShell — global sidebar/header not visible on these two routes
K31-B is minimum-fix only; ProtectedShell wrapping left for a future stage (K31-C recommended)
manualTrialNotes: Login as ADMIN → /admin/adjustment-requests → see '返回排课展示' top-right → click → confirm /dashboard
Login as USER → /my-adjustment-requests → see '返回排课展示' top-right → click → confirm /dashboard
Confirm USER page does not show any /admin/* link
Confirm status filter / refresh on ADMIN page still works
Confirm refresh button on USER page still works
recommendedNextStage: K31-C (optional) — split page.tsx into server page + client content, wrap with ProtectedShell to expose global sidebar/header. Layout-only, no business impact.
